subtitle.en: The Science of Sacred Time — from Paramanu to Kalpa
subtitle.hi: पवित्र काल का विज्ञान — परमाणु से कल्प तक
subtitle.sa: पवित्र काल विज्ञानम् — परमाणु तः कल्प पर्यन्तम्
subtitle.ta: The Science of Sacred Time — from Paramanu to Kalpa
subtitle.te: The Science of Sacred Time — from Paramanu to Kalpa
subtitle.bn: The Science of Sacred Time — from Paramanu to Kalpa

kaalMaanDesc.en: The Hindu system of time measurement spans from the tiniest perceptible unit to cosmic eons, with precise mathematical ratios between each level.
kaalMaanDesc.hi: हिन्दू काल मापन प्रणाली सूक्ष्मतम बोधगम्य इकाई से ब्रह्मांडीय युगों तक फैली है, प्रत्येक स्तर के बीच सटीक गणितीय अनुपात के साथ।
kaalMaanDesc.sa: हिन्दू काल मापन प्रणाली सूक्ष्मतमात् बोधगम्य इकाइत् ब्रह्मांडीय युगान् यावत् विस्तृता अस्ति।
kaalMaanDesc.ta: The Hindu system of time measurement spans from the tiniest perceptible unit to cosmic eons, with precise mathematical ratios between each level.
kaalMaanDesc.te: The Hindu system of time measurement spans from the tiniest perceptible unit to cosmic eons, with precise mathematical ratios between each level.
kaalMaanDesc.bn: The Hindu system of time measurement spans from the tiniest perceptible unit to cosmic eons, with precise mathematical ratios between each level.
kaalMaanDesc.kn: The Hindu system of time measurement spans from the tiniest perceptible unit to cosmic eons, with precise mathematical ratios between each level.
kaalMaanDesc.gu: The Hindu system of time measurement spans from the tiniest perceptible unit to cosmic eons, with precise mathematical ratios between each level.
kaalMaanDesc.mai: हिन्दू काल मापन प्रणाली सूक्ष्मतम बोधगम्य इकाई से ब्रह्मांडीय युगों तक फैली है।
kaalMaanDesc.mr: हिन्दू काल मापन प्रणाली सूक्ष्मतम बोधगम्य इकाई से ब्रह्मांडीय युगों तक फैली है।

fourYugasDesc.en: A Mahayuga consists of four Yugas in descending quality. Together they span 4,320,000 years, after which the cycle repeats.
fourYugasDesc.hi: एक महायुग में अवरोही गुणवत्ता के चार युग होते हैं। मिलकर वे 4,320,000 वर्ष तक फैले हैं, जिसके बाद चक्र दोहराता है।
fourYugasDesc.sa: एक महायुगे अवरोहि गुणस्य चत्वारि युगानि सन्ति। सम्मिलितानि तानि 4,320,000 वर्षाणि विस्तृतानि।
fourYugasDesc.ta: A Mahayuga consists of four Yugas in descending quality. Together they span 4,320,000 years, after which the cycle repeats.
fourYugasDesc.te: A Mahayuga consists of four Yugas in descending quality. Together they span 4,320,000 years, after which the cycle repeats.
fourYugasDesc.bn: A Mahayuga consists of four Yugas in descending quality. Together they span 4,320,000 years, after which the cycle repeats.
fourYugasDesc.kn: A Mahayuga consists of four Yugas in descending quality. Together they span 4,320,000 years, after which the cycle repeats.
fourYugasDesc.gu: A Mahayuga consists of four Yugas in descending quality. Together they span 4,320,000 years, after which the cycle repeats.
fourYugasDesc.mai: एक महायुग में चार युग होते हैं। मिलकर वे 4,320,000 वर्ष तक फैले हैं।
fourYugasDesc.mr: एक महायुग में चार युग होते हैं। मिलकर वे 4,320,000 वर्ष तक फैले हैं।

ayanamshaDesc.en: The tropical zodiac drifts relative to the fixed stars due to Earth's axial precession. Ayanamsha is the correction applied to convert tropical longitudes to sidereal.
ayanamshaDesc.hi: पृथ्वी के अक्षीय अग्रगमन के कारण उष्णकटिबंधीय राशिचक्र स्थिर तारों के सापेक्ष विचलित होता है। अयनांश उष्णकटिबंधीय देशांतरों को सायन राशिचक्र में परिवर्तित करने के लिए लागू किया जाने वाला सुधार है।
ayanamshaDesc.sa: पृथ्व्याः अक्षीय अग्रगमनेन उष्णकटिबंधीय राशिचक्र स्थिर ताराभिः सापेक्षम् विचलते। अयनांशः उष्णकटिबंधीय देशान्तरान् सायन राशिचक्रे परिवर्तयितुं प्रयुज्यते।
ayanamshaDesc.ta: The tropical zodiac drifts relative to the fixed stars due to Earth's axial precession. Ayanamsha is the correction applied to convert tropical longitudes to sidereal.
ayanamshaDesc.te: The tropical zodiac drifts relative to the fixed stars due to Earth's axial precession. Ayanamsha is the correction applied to convert tropical longitudes to sidereal.
ayanamshaDesc.bn: The tropical zodiac drifts relative to the fixed stars due to Earth's axial precession. Ayanamsha is the correction applied to convert tropical longitudes to sidereal.
ayanamshaDesc.kn: The tropical zodiac drifts relative to the fixed stars due to Earth's axial precession. Ayanamsha is the correction applied to convert tropical longitudes to sidereal.
ayanamshaDesc.gu: The tropical zodiac drifts relative to the fixed stars due to Earth's axial precession. Ayanamsha is the correction applied to convert tropical longitudes to sidereal.
ayanamshaDesc.mai: पृथ्वी के अक्षीय अग्रगमन के कारण उष्णकटिबंधीय राशिचक्र स्थिर तारों के सापेक्ष विचलित होता है।
ayanamshaDesc.mr: पृथ्वी के अक्षीय अग्रगमन के कारण उष्णकटिबंधीय राशिचक्र स्थिर तारों के सापेक्ष विचलित होता है।

panchangaSystem.en: The Panchanga System — Five Limbs of Time
panchangaSystem.hi: पंचांग प्रणाली — काल के पाँच अंग
panchangaSystem.ta: The Panchanga System — Five Limbs of Time
panchangaSystem.te: The Panchanga System — Five Limbs of Time
panchangaSystem.bn: The Panchanga System — Five Limbs of Time
panchangaSystem.kn: The Panchanga System — Five Limbs of Time
panchangaSystem.gu: The Panchanga System — Five Limbs of Time
panchangaSystem.mai: पंचांग प्रणाली — काल के पाँच अंग
panchangaSystem.mr: पंचांग प्रणाली — काल के पाँच अंग

panchangaDesc.en: Panchanga (पञ्च + अङ्ग = five + limbs) describes the day through five astronomical measurements, giving a complete picture of the day's cosmic energy.
panchangaDesc.hi: पंचांग (पञ्च + अङ्ग = पाँच + अंग) पाँच खगोलशास्त्रीय मापों के माध्यम से दिन का वर्णन करता है, जो दिन की ब्रह्मांडीय ऊर्जा की पूर्ण तस्वीर देता है।
panchangaDesc.sa: पञ्चाङ्ग (पञ्च + अङ्ग = पञ्च + अङ्गानि) पञ्चखगोलशास्त्रीय मापनैः दिनस्य वर्णनं करोति।
panchangaDesc.ta: Panchanga (पञ्च + अङ्ग = five + limbs) describes the day through five astronomical measurements, giving a complete picture of the day's cosmic energy.
panchangaDesc.te: Panchanga (पञ्च + अङ्ग = five + limbs) describes the day through five astronomical measurements, giving a complete picture of the day's cosmic energy.
panchangaDesc.bn: Panchanga (পঞ্চ + অঙ্গ = five + limbs) describes the day through five astronomical measurements, giving a complete picture of the day's cosmic energy.
panchangaDesc.kn: Panchanga (ಪಂಚ + ಅಂಗ = five + limbs) describes the day through five astronomical measurements, giving a complete picture of the day's cosmic energy.
panchangaDesc.gu: Panchanga (પંચ + અંગ = five + limbs) describes the day through five astronomical measurements, giving a complete picture of the day's cosmic energy.
panchangaDesc.mai: पंचांग पाँच खगोलशास्त्रीय मापों के माध्यम से दिन का वर्णन करता है।
panchangaDesc.mr: पंचांग पाँच खगोलशास्त्रीय मापों के माध्यम से दिन का वर्णन करता है।

muhurtaDesc.en: Muhurta is the art of selecting auspicious moments for undertaking activities. A day has 30 Muhurtas (~48 min each), each ruled by a deity with specific qualities.
muhurtaDesc.hi: मुहूर्त कार्यों के लिए शुभ क्षणों के चयन की कला है। एक दिन में 30 मुहूर्त (~48 मिनट प्रत्येक) होते हैं, प्रत्येक एक विशिष्ट गुणों वाले देवता द्वारा शासित होता है।
muhurtaDesc.sa: मुहूर्तः कार्याणां शुभ क्षणानां चयनस्य कला अस्ति। एकस्मिन् दिने 30 मुहूर्ताः (~48 मिनटाः प्रत्येकम्) सन्ति।
muhurtaDesc.ta: Muhurta is the art of selecting auspicious moments for undertaking activities. A day has 30 Muhurtas (~48 min each), each ruled by a deity with specific qualities.
muhurtaDesc.te: Muhurta is the art of selecting auspicious moments for undertaking activities. A day has 30 Muhurtas (~48 min each), each ruled by a deity with specific qualities.
muhurtaDesc.bn: Muhurta is the art of selecting auspicious moments for undertaking activities. A day has 30 Muhurtas (~48 min each), each ruled by a deity with specific qualities.
muhurtaDesc.kn: Muhurta is the art of selecting auspicious moments for undertaking activities. A day has 30 Muhurtas (~48 min each), each ruled by a deity with specific qualities.
muhurtaDesc.gu: Muhurta is the art of selecting auspicious moments for undertaking activities. A day has 30 Muhurtas (~48 min each), each ruled by a deity with specific qualities.
muhurtaDesc.mai: मुहूर्त कार्यों के लिए शुभ क्षणों के चयन की कला है।
muhurtaDesc.mr: मुहूर्त कार्यों के लिए शुभ क्षणों के चयन की कला है।
